title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUCENA, PROVINCE OF TO THAT OF "NEW LUCENA".

chunks.text:
H. No. 2245 / 51 OG No. 6, 2819 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1255, June 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUCENA, PROVINCE OF TO THAT OF "NEW LUCENA".

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Lucena Province of Iloilo, is changed to that of "New Lucena".

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1955.
